title: PJ's Custom Hunger Bar
description: A minimalist, cherry-themed custom hunger bar.
body:
# Welcome to PJ's Custom Hunger Bar!
In this pack you will find a custom, cherry-themed hunger bar I made to go along with my custom hearts pack. (Also comes with built-in [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) support!)
> Also check out:
> - [PJ's Custom Hearts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pjs-custom-hearts)
> - [PJ's Custom Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pjs-custom-armor-bar)
> - PJ's Custom Hats - WIP
